zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC於1528年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾特藍特時，他的父親George Seton 6th Lord Seton21歲，母親Elizabeth Hay18歲。他於1549年8月2日與Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾特藍特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年1月8日在法國享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC于1528年1月1日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾特藍特时，他的父亲George Seton 6th Lord Seton21岁，母亲Elizabeth Hay18岁。他于1549年8月2日与Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾特藍特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年1月8日在法国享年57岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC was born on 1 January 1528, in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, George Seton 6th Lord Seton, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Hay, was 18. He married Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar on 2 August 1549, in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 January 1585, in France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC est né le 1 janvier 1528, à Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, George Seton 6th Lord Seton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hay, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar le 2 août 1549, à Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1585, à France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC am 1. Januar 1528 in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Seton 6th Lord Seton 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hay 18. Er hat am 2. August 1549 in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1585 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC è nato il il 1 gennaio 1528 nel Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, George Seton 6th Lord Seton, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hay, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar il 2 agosto 1549, nel Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 gennaio 1585, nel Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PCが1528年1月1日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアトランエントで生まれた時，父George Seton 6th Lord Setonは21歳，母Elizabeth Hayは18歳であった。1549年8月2日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアトランエントでIsabel Hamilton of Sanquharと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年1月8日にフランスで57歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC(이)가 1528년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 트랜트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Seton 6th Lord Seton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hay(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1549년 8월 2일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 트랜트에서 Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 1월 8일 프랑스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에 묻혔다.

mn.1 January 1528–8 January 1585: 1528 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1585 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 8
mn.Seton, East Lothian, Scotland: Seton, Hadintunshire, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.1 January 1528–8 January 1585: 1 de janeiro de 1528–8 de janeiro de 1585
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1528, em Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, George Seton 6th Lord Seton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hay, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar em 2 de agosto de 1549, em Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1585, em França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC родился 1 января 1528 г. в местности транент, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени George Seton 6th Lord Seton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hay, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar 2 августа 1549 г. в местности транент, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 января 1585 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.1 January 1528–8 January 1585: 1 de enero de 1528–8 de enero de 1585
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC nació el 1 de enero de 1528, en Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, George Seton 6th Lord Seton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hay, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar el 2 de agosto de 1549, en Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de enero de 1585, en Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
